outputs.patch.diff:
--- a/programs/tlf_responder.R
+++ b/programs/tlf_responder.R
@@ -1,15 +1,15 @@
 # Table 14-3.03 Responder Analysis
 # Responder defined as >= 4-point improvement in ADAS-Cog at Week 24
-# Bug 1: Wrong responder definition (used >= 2-point improvement)
-responder_flag <- ifelse(adadas$CHG >= 2, 1, 0)
+# Bug 1: Wrong responder definition (should be >= 4-point improvement)
+responder_flag <- ifelse(adadas$CHG >= 4, 1, 0)
 
 # Bug 2: Wrong statistical test (used chi-square instead of Fisher's exact)
-test_result <- chisq.test(table(adadas$TRTPN, responder_flag))
+test_result <- fisher.test(table(adadas$TRTPN, responder_flag))
 
 # Bug 3: Wrong denominator (used all subjects instead of ITT population)
-n_denom <- nrow(adadas)
+n_denom <- sum(adadas$ITTFL == "Y")
 
 # Bug 4: Missing not excluded (did not filter out non-ITT subjects)
-adadas_sub <- adadas
+adadas_sub <- adadas[adadas$ITTFL == "Y", ]
 
 # Rest of the table generation code remains unchanged
```
